heading: Plant material exchanges
label: 2147 Plant material exchanges
text: On and after , plant material exchanges may be made with botanic gardens, institutions, municipal parks, and gardens.July 8, 1935
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 217a of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002Section is based on par. under heading “BOTANIC GARDEN” in act of , known as the “Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1936”.July 8, 1935
